name: @workspace/api-server
description: Stub package — historical placeholder. The real Express HTTP servers live in apps/alloy-runtime-api (unified v1 surface), apps/alloy-embedding-api (embedding gateway), and apps/alloy-ingestion-orchestrator (ingestion control plane). Additional service-tier servers in services/* and workers/*. This stub retains the single ouroboros route export for backward-compatibility with any direct import path consumers; new transport work goes in the apps/* servers.
